---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Litmus doesn't currently support well?

## Proposed solution

A description of what you'd like to see. Sketches, API proposals, or example
usage are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they didn't fit.

## Additional context

Links to related projects, prior art, or specifications.
